units.description: Alignment precondition: weights and values have the same length.
common_failure_modes: allowing trailing values to be ignored

units.description: Capacity feasibility: the witness subset has total weight at most the capacity.
Value witness: there is a valid selection whose total value equals the returned result.
common_failure_modes: stating only a value upper bound

units.description: Optimality: no valid selection with total weight <= capacity achieves a strictly greater total value.
0/1 uniqueness: items appear at most once in any witness selection.
